ground_truth.description: Photo of Austrian flag in front of Austrian Parliament. Should be able to get this, though awkward angle. Nighttime but facade lit up.
ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo of the Austrian flag in front of the Austrian parliament. It should be able to get this, although it is a bit of an awkward angle. It's taken at night, but the facade is lit up.

details.description: Nighttime view of Vienna’s parliament complex. At left is a brightly lit neoclassical building with a temple front—tall Corinthian columns, a sculpted pediment and ornate friezes—constructed in pale stone. In front of the building are monumental stairways, balustrades and historicist lampposts. Dominating the right side is the Pallas Athena Fountain: a marble ensemble with a gilded-helmet figure of Athena holding a spear standing atop an elaborate base with reclining allegorical figures. Several tall Austrian national flags (red–white–red with coat of arms) fly on flagpoles. The sky is dark, and in the distant background two slender Gothic spires are visible, likely from a nearby church.

entities.notes: Designed by Theophil Hansen; built 1874–1883 on the Ringstraße; seat of the Nationalrat and Bundesrat.

entities.notes: Monumental fountain in front of Parliament; gilded statue of Athena atop a marble group with allegories; completed 1902; associated artists include Carl Kundmann, Josef Tautenhayn and Hugo Haerdtl.

details.description: Nighttime view of a grand neoclassical building with a prominent colonnade of tall fluted columns and a sculpted pediment. Warm exterior lighting casts gold tones on the stone, highlighting intricate statues along the facade. Two tall flagpoles with red-white-red Austrian flags flank the scene, located on a broad plaza. In the foreground to the right stands a tall pedestal supporting a white statue of a robed figure, surrounded by smaller sculptural elements at the base. The architectural style and layout, plus the flag setup, suggest a formal government square in Vienna (likely Heldenplatz), with other historic structures and spires faintly visible in the distance against the night sky.

details.description: Nighttime view of the Austrian Parliament Building in Vienna, brightly illuminated with a grand Corinthian colonnade and sculpted pediment. In the foreground stands the Pallas Athena Fountain, featuring a gilded-helmet statue of the goddess holding a spear atop a marble base with allegorical figures. Tall flagpoles fly the red‑white‑red Austrian flags. The scene is photographed from the Ringstraße directly in front of the Parliament complex.

details.description: Night exterior of a grand neoclassical building with a prominent columned portico. The facade is lit, revealing tall, evenly spaced columns and carved statues along the steps. In the foreground, a statue on a pedestal is illuminated beside a curved stairway. Several tall flagpoles with red-and-white flags flank the scene, and distant spires glow faintly against the dark sky, suggesting a central Vienna location near Ringstrasse, close to the Volkstheater.

details.description: A low-angle nighttime photograph capturing the illuminated facade of the Austrian Parliament Building and the Pallas Athene Fountain in Vienna. On the left, the neoclassical building features a grand ramp and a portico with fluted Corinthian columns supporting a pediment adorned with relief sculptures. An ornate, glowing street lamp stands in the foreground near the ramp's balustrade. To the right, the Pallas Athene Fountain is highlighted, featuring the white marble statue of the goddess Athena standing atop a tall pillar, wearing a gilded helmet and holding a spear. High above in the dark sky, a large Austrian flag waves from a tall red flagpole, with a second flag visible further back. In the distance between the building and the flagpole, the faint twin spires of the Votive Church (Votivkirche) are visible against the night sky.

details.description: A night photograph of the Austrian Parliament Building in Vienna, showcasing its Greek Revival architecture. The illuminated facade features a prominent pediment with intricate sculptures and a row of fluted Corinthian columns. In the foreground stands the Pallas Athene Fountain, topped by a gilded statue of the Greek goddess Athena holding a spear and a small Nike. Several Austrian national flags are visible, fluttering on tall red poles. In the distant background, the twin spires of the Votivkirche are faintly visible against the dark sky. The scene is lit by warm artificial lights, creating strong highlights and shadows on the stone structures.

details.description: Nighttime view of Vienna’s Austrian Parliament Building with its illuminated neoclassical portico of Corinthian columns and sculpted pediment. In the foreground stands the Pallas Athena Fountain, topped by the large statue of the goddess with gilded details (helmet and small Nike figure). The fountain’s marble figures are visible around the base. Multiple Austrian national flags fly on tall poles beside the forecourt along the Ringstraße.

details.description: Night-time view of a grand neoclassical public building with a columned facade. Fluted columns line a broad portico, supporting a richly sculpted entablature and pediment. Numerous statues sit atop the structure and along the lower frieze, illuminated to reveal classical figures and relief work. In the foreground, tall flagpoles bear red-and-white banners, adding a ceremonial tone to the plaza. The setting suggests a civic square with ornate stonework, statue groups, and a large stair or platform leading up to the building.

details.description: Nighttime view of the Austrian Parliament Building in Vienna, Austria. The warmly lit, Greek‑revival facade with a grand colonnaded portico and sculpted pediment is seen behind the prominent Pallas Athena Fountain. The central marble statue of Athena, with gilded helmet, spear, and a small Nike figure in her hand, stands atop an elaborate fountain base with seated allegorical figures. Several Austrian national flags fly on tall poles in the foreground.

details.description: A night-time view of a grand neoclassical plaza. On the right, a monumental building with tall, fluted columns and sculpted figures along the cornice is illuminated by spotlights. In front of the building, several statues stand on pedestals and at the base of a curved staircase. To the left, two tall flagpoles display red-and-white flags. The scene is set against a dark sky, with warm lighting emphasizing architectural details and statues.

details.description: A night photograph, rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise (gravity pulls to the right), depicting the Austrian Parliament Building in Vienna. The scene is dominated by the illuminated neoclassical façade of the Parliament, featuring a grand portico with Corinthian columns and a triangular pediment filled with relief sculptures. In the foreground stands the Pallas Athena Fountain (Pallas-Athene-Brunnen), with the central white marble figure of the goddess Athena wearing a gilded helmet and holding a spear. To the left (in the upright orientation), a red-white-red Austrian flag waves from a flagpole against the stark black night sky. The building is lit by warm artificial floodlights.

details.description: A night photograph of the Austrian Parliament Building in Vienna, oriented vertically. The neoclassical building features a prominent pediment with intricate sculptural reliefs and a row of illuminated Corinthian columns. In the foreground stands the Pallas Athena Fountain, dominated by a large white marble statue of the goddess Pallas Athena, who wears a gilded helmet and holds a spear and a small figure of Nike. Several Austrian flags, featuring the red-white-red horizontal stripes and the national coat of arms, are seen flying from tall poles. The scene is brightly lit against a dark night sky, emphasizing the white marble and architectural details.
